Arsenal face academy MELTDOWN after Wilshere exit
arts.sum: As per The Athletic, Wilshere’s decision to leave the club has been met with shock, with many frustrated that Arsenal failed to make a concerted effort to retain the 32-year-old. Wilshere has played a key role in Dowman’s development at Arsenal and the Gunners could now risk losing the teenager when his schoolboy terms expire in 2026.
